use_cases: Hero section background with animated image effect for engaging visual impact
Portfolio showcase with dynamic tile-based image presentation
Landing page visual element for creative agencies and design studios
Interactive image gallery with fragmented mosaic animation
Product showcase with eye-catching animated image tiles
ai_summary: Animated tiles component that fragments an image into a grid of tiles with varying opacity levels and smooth animations. Each tile displays a portion of the source image using CSS background positioning, creating a mosaic effect. The component supports customizable grid size, tile dimensions, image source, and background color. Designed for hero sections and visual showcases where an engaging animated image effect enhances the aesthetic appeal.
